differential_diagnoses: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with lupus nephritis and secondary antiphospholipid syndrome
Renal vein thrombosis secondary to nephrotic syndrome
next_steps: Perform diagnostic workup for SLE and APS (ANA, anti-dsDNA, C3/C4, antiphospholipid antibodies)
Urgent renal biopsy to evaluate nephrotic syndrome and vasculitis
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics pending final culture results
